svg.title: Security envelope — defense in depth
svg.desc: Six concentric rectangles representing six enforcement surfaces. From outside in: whitelist plus optional read-only role and observer transcript at the bridge edge (Layer 16); persona ACL via cowork plus forge; policy via forge.policy with hot-reload and per-persona sandbox overrides; sandbox via bwrap with loopback-deny shim; path-gate hook blocking direct Write or Edit or Bash to forge / skill-forge / audit / policy regardless of permission mode; operator elevation gating forge_promote and skill_promote behind a chat-bound PIN. A thick audit-log band at the bottom catches every gate event into a SHA-256-chained file.
svg.text: Security envelope — six surfaces, one audit log
Each surface catches a different class of failure. The audit log records every block and every action.
Surface 1 · whitelist + read-only role (bridge daemon)
Catches: unknown senders. Trust boundary. Layer 16: read_only list (in chat, may not trigger), observer_visibility:transcript (text fed as ambient context).
Surface 2 · persona ACL (cowork + forge)
Catches: scope mistakes. tools / disallowed_tools / permission_mode (Claude Code) · FORGE_ALLOWED_TOOLS (forge)
Surface 3 · policy (forge.policy + skill-forge linter, hot-reload)
Catches: project-wide rule violations. forbidden_tool_names · breakers · persona_namespaces · linter (NFKC + confusables, prompt-injection, secrets)
Surface 4 · sandbox (bwrap + loopback-deny)
Catches: a forged tool actually doing what it should not. minimal mount set · /tmp tmpfs · x-bind only · no net unless overridden · loopback shim
Surface 5 · path-gate hook (PreToolUse, structural)
Catches: direct Write / Edit / Bash to forge / skill-forge / audit.jsonl / policy.json — regardless of permission_mode. Layer-16 v2: eval/exec/$()/heredoc fail-closed.
Surface 6 · operator elevation (PIN, Layer 16)
Catches: unauthorised promotion. /auth-up <pin> engages a TTL-bounded grant; forge_promote / skill_promote denied without it.
forged tool exec · skill body inject · promotion
runs here only with the conjunction of all six surfaces' decisions
a single deny in any ring blocks the action and writes an audit event
audit log — SHA-256-chained, append-only
forge + skill-forge + bridge + ACL denials + policy reloads + breaker trips + path_gate.denied + auth_elevation.* — voice-audit verify walks the chain.
Layer 16 / Roadmap L: daily systemd timer (04:30) re-verifies and pushes a bridge notification on chain break.
